    if task.get('id') in ['GATE-3','GATE-3-CI','GATE-3-CI-CAPTURE'] or 'Gate 3' in str(task.get('title','')) or 'CI' in str(task.get('title','')):

    queue.setdefault('tasks',[]).append({'id':'GATE-3-PERMISSION-FIX','title':'Fix CI proof commit permissions via Claude MCP workflow/settings repair','status':'BLOCKED_FOR_CLAUDE','priority':1,'depends_on':['GATE-3-CI-CAPTURE'],'criteria':'GitHub Actions can write governance/state/gate3_ci_proof.json or alternative proof capture path is implemented','touch_workflows':True,'owner':'Claude MCP'})
